### Product Information

- Excellent heavy cutting polish that removes noticeable swirls and ultra fine scratches

- Commonly used with a Lake Country Yellow Cutting Pad or a Lake Country Purple Foamed Wool Pad

- We recommend following up with a lighter pad and polish combination to restore a glossy finish

- Protect the paint after polishing with the Menzerna Power Lock!

- Product Code: M-1000Q

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

84% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 19 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

Heavy Cut Compound 1000 is a heavy cutting polish or compound that comes from Menzerna, which is one of the world's oldest and most distinguished polish manufacturers. This product was formerly known as the Menzerna Power Gloss but it still utilizes the same great formula but with an updated name and label. This heavy cutting polish is designed to help remove some of your worst surface imperfections so you can have the paint looking it's best again. Generic heavy cutting polishes use large polishing particles to get their cutting power that are loosely clustered. These larger particles almost certainly mean the clear coat will have more haze and marring which requires more polishing afterward to restore a transparent clearcoat. Menzerna uses a very different approach that gives you more cutting power and a fraction of the haze that generic compounds and heavy cutting polishes leave behind. Menzerna uses an ingenious method of using much smaller micro abrasive particles that are identical in size and densely clustered. Having all of these uniform micro abrasives tightly gathered gives you outstanding cutting power to remove deeper swirls, oxidation, light scratches and other surface imperfections. If your vehicle has noticeable surface imperfections and it needs to be restored to like new condition then the Heavy Cut Compound is the perfect product to start with. Whenever you use a heavy cutting polish we typically recommend you follow it up with lighter polish(s) to ensure there is no haze and the surface has optimal gloss. Use the Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound today and say good-bye to surface imperfections and hello to a deep shine.



To learn more about Menzerna Polishes and the 2015 label name change please see the [Menzerna Polishing Chart](https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-Polishing-Chart/).

### From The Label

#### Product Description

**Rubbing Compound**

Swiftly removes medium scratches and 1500 sand marks

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Matthew H. on 11/8/2022

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

There is no substitute for this heavy cut compound. I have tried many, including 3m products endorsed by body shops, and this does a job I haven't gotten from the others. My greatest triumph with this has been on gelcoat, where it has saved me an entire polishing stage by not only cutting through heavy oxidation on a 38' boat in rough shape, but finishing well enough to do just 1 additional stage of polishing to get a high gloss result. It saved me at least 6-8 hours of heavy work on a big job I had almost no help with. Boat guys swear by 3m super cut, but but this stuff cut that oxidation just as quick, and finished much much better. When it comes to cars, it will get the job done as well, I use it on keying scratches, bumper scrapes, and headlight restoration to name a few tough jobs. Stop looking for a compound and get this stuff, you won't regret it.

Reviewed by Armand H. on 2/10/2014

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

I use this with an orange pad and it most certainly will take care of your more obvious scratches and can remove the haziness and rough spots off of finish quickly.

Reviewed by wesley p. on 2/18/2013

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Power Gloss Compound is something I use for problem scratches that haven't gone through the clear coat. I also find it valuable when I have to polish by hand areas such as under door handles etc. I use the purple wool pad with this product followed by FF3000 or finer.

[Read all customer reviews of Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 1000](https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-M10/Power-Gloss-P74/Reviews/)
